title: piper numinica
intro: Piper numinica, a lesser-known species of the pepper plant family, is a tropical plant native to certain regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Piper numinica include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Piper numinica often involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts that can be consumed as teas, capsules, or topical creams.
intro_study: According to the study on "Current molecular pharmacology", piper nigrum (also referred to as piper numinica) benefits include acting as a bio-enhancer for other drugs, increasing their absorption and reducing the dose and dose-related toxic potential, thereby possessing various medicinal and pharmacological activities such as cholesterol-lowering and anti-cancer effects.
constituents: Piper numinica has many active constituents, such as alkaloids (piperine, piperonaline, and pipernonaline), flavonoids (kaempferol, quercetin, and rutin), and phenolic compounds (ferulic acid and sinapic acid), which possess various medicinal properties that benefit people's daily lives. These constituents have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, the flavonoids in Piper numinica have been shown to have cardiovascular benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and improving blood lipid profiles, thereby decreasing the risk of heart disease. By incorporating Piper numinica into their daily lives, people can experience improved overall health, enhanced cognitive function, and increased protection against chronic diseases.
